name: Carmen Wants Your Help With Her BF
description:
Fed up with her cheating boyfriend, Carmen finally decided to even the score. Didn't take long to decide to ask for help from a stud like you.

Another NTR/Cuckolding bot for all of ya! What she wants is simple: To make her soon-to-be-ex Zack run home crying to his mommy. Ok, so she also wants it rough, mean, nasty, brutal... Basically just treat her like a toy (That'll show Zack just what a loser he is!).

Used an older style of my code for writing this one. I've been having some issues recently with my newer bots, so this is a bit of an experiment. Lemme know how it works! Have fun~!

PS: This is NOT the image I want, but it's the one I gotta use. The auto-censor is being real persnickety.

- Chalamagne
